reviews.review_description: As a Blair Witch fan I was in love with this concept. As a port, its descent, although the bugs and lack of polish are more prominent in the VR version. The story is interesting but the VR gameplay mechanics fall flat. Overall, impressive attempt, but ultimately unfulfilling.
This game was super bad I didn't have fun at all and the ending was super predictable and I can't refund this game either and I played less then 3 hours and didn't enjoy any of it

This game has far too many bugs for a game this old. Expect softlocks requiring restarting your game. Audio glitches making cutscene an exercise in reading. It is a walking simulator with minimal puzzles and a real lack of scares. Pass on this one.

reviews.review_title: Buggy af and waste of time
reviews.review_description: I dont mind the graphics. I've played this on Xbox and enjoyed it and playing it again in vr completely changed the way it feels. It's a blast but bugs often occur between loading screens such as the creatures getting stuck in walls and when it happens bullet gets stuck barking at it, and bullet will completely stop moving at other times also noting sometimes the tape recorder doesn't function properly. Well I officially give up on this. I'm tired of these companies putting unfinished games on the Market. Did you even bother to test it? For real. Can't progress the game because of constant npc enemies freezing and bullet freezing. So stupid I can't even get my money back and I highly doubt they will update the game because it's been up for a while but we will see
I love the story and the characters in the game.I also loved the puzzles in the game. I just wish there was more because it was so fun to play.

Very good game with bad graphics on quest 3. 
Please release an upgrade to meta quest 3. Please add shadows, better textures etc.

Please add really crouch mode...example: if I really crouch, I cannot enter the tent.
Very scary, awesome, graphics are realistic I love this game! Best game played so far!

I can't stand the main character, he's a whiney, angry little man who wallows in self-pity and angry outbursts. It's hard to be such a knob amd continue playing the game.  The functions on the hand consoles are hard to control at times or they dont function at all which can be frustrating. A lot of glitches in this game and I start getting nauseous and headachy every time after about an hour which seems to be a common complaint about this game. It's the furst game where this happens to me. I am disappointed because it had good revieuws. The dog is a cool assett, the rest is a bit poor.

The graphics may be a little lackluster, the glitches a tad bit annoying, the beginning a LITTLE bit monotonous, but the gradual additions to the insanity, the gradual sequence to the final chapter, where every time you turn something changes, it's terrifying, amazing, and just generally a great game. It's scary in its own right, maybe not the most scary, but as a game, it's amazing.

This game has mastered the art of gradual buildup of terror, in that it starts with a sense of unease and builds into a crescendo of terror by the end. The last chapters are just undescribably terrifying. This is the only game where I've had to put my headset down to take a break.

I got this game on sale and it's a good thing. 
It's boring and the dog is  annoying beyond belief.  Lame story line, not even worth the sale price.
I was really looking forward to this game but every time I get to a certain point 10 mins in ish the game won't progress even after restarting the game
Idk why I keep getting stuck on campsite and I see other people having these problems too is it a bug?

Like reviewer Jessica, I couldn't get through the hole in the wall in Chapter 17.  I can see the red tape but can't get it.  Why has the the other reviewer who reported this bug not received a response from the developers?  It is so frustrating to get to the final chapter of the game, not be able to finish it, and get no response to the bug being reported.

Until then I had really enjoyed playing. I loved the spooky atmosphere and was really invested in the story and keen to see how it ended.

I raised a support call a few days ago but it was ignored, apart from the auto-acknowledgement. 

2 weeks later I got an apology for missing my support call, then nothing since. I'm really annoyed now. They really are useless. Unless you want to get stuck part way through the game and receive no support, avoid this app.

The game is OK, nice... Bud in chapter 7, when i moved up the stone with camera, Bullet didnt dig... The dog sits a short distance from the stone and does nothing. And this is practical end game for me! I tried again and again.
I watcht same gameplay and there work it perfektly.
I am realy alone, with this bug? 
It is big disappointment. So much money for a game that can't be finished. 
It is a pity and shame...

reviews.review_title: Very Dark Visuals on the Quest 2
reviews.review_description:
Hard to see what is happening. I know the Quest 2 doesn't do black levels as well as the Quest 1 so that may account for it.

The story is interesting and a decent length. Graphics are okay for a Quest game. Voice acting is top notch.

This is another game though with an odd saving system. Be prepared to do bits of the game over if you only get to play it for short periods. I always think VR games especially should have a good saving system in case you have to take your headset off. The last part of the game is long with few save points.

not really a lot to say stuck on chapter 3 everytime I walk through the wood I fall through the floor and have to restart I've done this 6 times now. Really dont want to play the game again and now I feel I've wasted my money.

For the first, i like it and don´t regret the buy. Good atmosphere and many potential.
But now the reasons for the three stars:
The graphic is really bad, i know it is difficult to convert games with good graphics on the standalone hardware, but the mix between bad graphic(the map style with hard edges remember me on PS1 times) and "good" graphics(cam, flashlight and phone looking good) killed the immersion a little bit.
And if the graphics don´t kill the immersion, then the many bugs do it.
The bugs starts with many popups in the landscape and some lightnings on the sky(sometimes it feels like a forrest dicso), goes over bad and random teleportation of the player(sometimes i was teleported in the air or a little bit back if i crouch and grab to something and the most time it load a new area, i look in the wrong way). Grab something is another point, it would be help to calibrate the grab points for flashlight, phone and others. Many times i grab the false things or if i try to grab something from the ground i take my cam or my phone. 
And the last point, Bullet, the dumbest Dog i ever met. He walk against every obstacle and take 10-15 seconds till he found a way out, if they find a way. The baddest part with Bullet: I load in a new area and Bullet spawned in a tree(in the air), i try to call him and he lay down and chill so i had no other choice to walk alone. 

But without all this points it could be a really great game. Hope for upcoming patches and maybe a little gameplay update.

Sorry for my bad english, iam from germany.

developer_response.body:
Hi! The game is constantly being improved. We fixed some of the most important models, so they would look better (1.46). 

Pop-ups were partially fixed (mostly in the beginning of the game). 

We slightly fixed the guidance of dog in some parts (1.46).

Spawn in the tree - fixed (1.46), but probably You need to play from autosave ch5 - 'The loss'

reviews.review_title: More of this sort of thing!
reviews.review_description: I'm only a few chapters in, but what the developers have managed to create with the relatively weak graphics capabilities of the quest is an atmospheric, well paced horror. They managed to convince a part of my brain that I was in a dark wood, with a canine companion I quickly gained affection for. Actually, reminded me quite a lot of similar woodland walks with my dog when I was younger, sans witches and ghouls. Very worth a play.
People say they get scared on this game there baby’s. I legit peed my pants playing this I had a heart attack scariest game ever!

Creepy but not scary. Fun game to play alone…. 25% off with link, remove space between .com


https://www.oculus .com/appreferrals/DemonSlayer0000/2799962826754702/?utm_source=2
Frustrated where are tutorials. Need a tutor or sending back. Can’t rate could be me?

reviews.review_title: More fun than the flat version
reviews.review_description:
I played the flat version when it came out but got bored with it after a couple hours. This new Quest port is infinitely more fun to play and surprisingly good looking. VR really sells the psychological aspects of the story too. 

There are, however, a few too many bugs here to make this a must play. I had a progress-halting bug in Chapter 7 where the "Red Tape" mechanic didn't manipulate the environment as it was meant to, which therefore wouldn't trigger Bullet to collect the item needed to progress. After a few quit and reloads, I didn't even end up solving the puzzle properly... After loading back in a few times Bullet suddenly just had the item and the game moved on.
I've also died a few times just moving around, completely outside of enemy encounters. I'll literally go through a doorway and suddenly get one hit killed and kicked back to the main menu.

Hopefully some updates can polish up the rough edges!

developer_response.body: Hi! We fixed the bug connected with rewinding the camera (patch 1.46)

reviews.review_description: So i get all the way threw the game up to what i thinks the last chapter...im in the cabin i see the tape threw the wall but i cant get to it...played threw a few times and it wont let me get the tape no matter what i do.. so frustrating 😫 it wont let me get to the end this is trash !!!
This game is a lot of fun if you enjoy the outdoors and love horror games. It builds up slowly. It will leave you scared to move around the next dark corner.

Ok, to be honest, I was scared to be scared but it's fine. Basically, You're Just hanging around in the woods and... Things happen. But I like the way they happen, and the story is pretty cool and god I love bullet, and I really thinks he helps making things less scary! For now I'm chapter eight and I give 4 stars

I’m pretty sure I’m about to complete this game for the first time but I just wanna know if their is any other endings like the console or if their is only one ending no matter what you do (if anyone has an answer let me know please add me as a friend and chat with me about this, very much appreciated) but this is a fun game all in all I do recommend this if your into horror games
I just love this game based off one of my favorite movies.  Bullet is one smart pooch.  Cannot wait to see what else is in store as I move along in the chapters.

Fantastic horror game, ramps the atmosphere up to 11, if you've ever been by yourself in a forest/bush after dark this captures the eerie feeling perfectly. 

HUGE fan of the original movie, so props to the devs for capturing the atmosphere so well. 

Don't go in expecting A++ story, its decent and does the job and lmao at people saying it all looks the same, its the forest guys what did you expect. 

If you're looking for a good horror game with great atmosphere this is it. 

No bugs thus far aside from Bullet running in place for a second or two.

P.S. Was not a fan of this on PC at all, but works perfectly for VR.

So the graphics aren't as good as the Xbox version which I have also played but the Xbox version never made my heart race while listening to trees crashing down around me in the woods because my only source of vision in the dark was a flashlight. Horror in VR is awesome and this one has great atmosphere and a really good story. I decided to give it 5 stars because I actually had to put it down and play something else before I go to bed. 

Let me say this despite the graphics not being the same as the Xbox version of the game this is the best way to experience it because nothing can compare to feel as though you are in the world. Also in the dark which is where 90% of the game takes place you won't notice much of a difference. If you like horror and want a great game with an amazing story don't pass this one up!

developer_response.body: Ha ha! Thanks a lot mate! And peaceful dreams: D

reviews.review_description: It’s so different than other versions, in a good way. So immersive and scary.
This game is scary I  like  you can  have a dog with you its scary  with jump scareds I like it  it's a cool game 😰😨😱I love it

I am getting really tired of going in circles..looked up walkthrough..I do what it says ...(getting ball to appear) but not working...I feel like I'm missing a lot of things...keep ending up at the campsite if I start again on another saved game. Starting to feel the money for this was a waste. Any help greatly appreciated..

reviews.review_title: Not for the faint of heart
reviews.review_description: This game is very intense. I screamed and used a few choice words quite a few times. So scared at times I pushed forward with either my head down looking at the floor or closing my real eyes. Took me a while to finish the game because it got too intense and had to take the headset off to settle my heart and nerves, I don't know why I put myself through it, lol. Finished the game today, finally. Thank you for the scares.
Its really cool and i have no problems with it but some glitches with bullet and the lack a bag for other stuff instead of just pictures and paper

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thx :) In patch 1.46, we fixed a lot of bugs connected with dog. 
As for the lack of backpack - we have a notebook for papers, sadly there is no backpack in Quest version.

reviews.review_description: I love the story in this game. I like how it starts off slowly with just exploring and seeing what you can do in the environment, then progressively gets more intense. Good game!

I really enjoyed playing Blair Witch and highly recommend it, if you're looking for an intense experience. I do feel like there were allot of missed opportunities for more jump scares but Blair Witch does do a great job of keeping you feeling uneasy throughout the entire game. It took me just over 10 hours to complete Blair Witch on my 1st playthrough, which I thought was very generous. Blair Witch does have some replayabilty due to the fact that it progresses you through the story at some points when you're not expecting it to causing you to miss some areas. There are no achievements at this time, but if the devs added achievements it would add to the replayabilty. Blair Witch was also nothing like the console version which is a big plus.

reviews.review_title: SPOILERS READ WITH CAUTIONGood game but…
reviews.review_description: Can you even get the good ending?? I beat the game on pc but there’s a certain part of the game you need to do to get the good ending. You open the Bunker and you have to use a fuse to fix the radio in the bunker but that puzzle isn’t in the vr version so how do I fix it??
Well I'm a little dissappointed,there seems to be a little to much running around the forest,there's only basically one enemy,an bullet needs to be a little more attentive for u.3 stars
just when i thought i had it solved...i didn't . screamed outloud alot. worth it!
